seoTitle: Kingston vs Kirk Rock — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Kingston and Kirk Rock. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Kingston vs Kirk Rock: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Kingston and Kirk Rock.
heading: Kingston vs Kirk Rock — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Kingston, Western Australia and Kirk Rock, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Kirk Rock has a lower overall climate risk score (38/100) compared to Kingston (47/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Kingston or Kirk Rock safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Kingston has a flood risk score of 39/100, while Kirk Rock scores 60/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Kingston scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Kirk Rock scores 22/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Kingston or Kirk Rock?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Kirk Rock has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.55% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
